stories.title: Follow live: AJ Dybantsa selected No. 1, Jazz take...
stories.summary: Tune in to ABC and ESPN to watch how the first round of the NBA draft plays out.

stories.title: Wizards opt for BYU's Dybantsa with No. 1 pick
stories.summary: The Wizards ushered in a new era by drafting AJ Dybantsa first overall, selecting him over Kansas' Darryn Peterson.

stories.title: Jayhawks' Peterson lands with Jazz at No. 2 pick
stories.summary: Kansas guard Darryn Peterson, who had been considered a potential No. 1 pick, wound up with the Jazz as the second pick of the 2026 NBA draft.

stories.title: Rebuilding Grizzlies nab Duke's Boozer at No. 3
stories.summary: Memphis took another step toward its next era with the selection of Cameron Boozer, a move that could accelerate the club's reset.

stories.title: Bulls boost frontcourt, take UNC's Wilson at No. 4...
stories.summary: The Bulls used the fourth overall pick on North Carolina's Caleb Wilson, considered perhaps the best athlete with one of the highest upsides in this year's draft.
